title: Axial Anomaly Induced Fermion Fractionization and Effective Gauge Theory Actions in Odd Dimensional Space-Times
canonical_scope: Primary parity-anomaly source linking odd-dimensional effective actions, anomaly inflow, and fractionalized fermion number.

section_map.title: Odd-Dimensional Effective Action
